title: TONIFUL 40 Inch Large Silver Letter K Balloons Helium Balloons,Foil Mylar Big Balloons for Birthday Party Anniversary Supplies Decorations
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES-- Letter K Balloon*1,40 inch Silver Letter balloon,you can choose the Letter you want.
MATERIAL-- Material of Letter Jumbo Helium Balloons is foil, color uniform, beautiful and safe.
AMAZING PHOTO PROP -- It is a huge size and beautiful and unique Black color visual effects.
CONWENIENCE-- Easy to inflate using the a straw or an air handheld pump,Can be air filled or helium filled.
WIDE RANGE OF USAGE-- This Black Letter Foil Balloon is a Great Party Decoration for Graduation,Birthday,Wedding,Bridal Shower,Bachelorette,New Year Eve or Other Party Occasions.
